description: Create a Free Recall memory experiment in PsychoPy Builder where participants study a list of words and then type as many as they can remember. The experiment requires a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/word_list.csv with a 'word' header and 15 nouns: Apple, Bridge, Camera, Doctor, Engine, Forest, Guitar, Harbor, Island, Jungle, Kettle, Lemon, Magnet, Number, Office. The experiment file, saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/free_recall.psyexp, must include an 'instructions' routine, a 'study' routine (displaying $word for 2.0 seconds) within a sequential loop linked to the CSV, a 3.0-second 'transition' routine, a 90-second 'recall' routine with an editable TextBox named 'recall_box', and a 'thanks' routine.
